recalls.Description: This recall involves Ophanie large fluffy/shag area rugs. The rectangular rugs are pink and were sold in two sizes: 5 feet x 8 feet and 6 feet x 9 feet. "Ultra Soft Fluffy Area Rugs", the letter "T", "100% Polyester", "High-density Sponge", "PVC Anti-slip Dots" and usage instructions are printed on a label on the side of the product.
recalls.Title: Ophanie Area Rugs Recalled Due to Fire Hazard; Violation of Federal Flammability Regulations; Sold Exclusively on Amazon.com by Ophanie
recalls.ConsumerContact: Ophanie toll-free at 888-281-8150 from 11:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, email at recall@liyi99.com, or online at http://www.ophanie.com/recall/index.html or www.ophanie.com and click "Recall" at the top of the page for more information.

Images.Caption: Front of Label on recalled rug
Back of Label on recalled rug

Injuries.Name: The firm has received one report of a fire. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Exclusively online at Amazon.com from April 2024 through June 2024 for between $42 to $65.

Hazards.Name: The recalled area rugs violate the mandatory federal flammability regulations for carpets and rugs, posing a fire hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the recalled rugs immediately and contact Ophanie for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to destroy the product by cutting it in half, and to provide proof of destruction by sending a photo of the cut product to recall@liyi99.com to receive a full refund. Ophanie is contacting all known purchasers directly.

recalls.Description: Touchat has issued a recall for its Large Fuzzy Area Rugs due to non-compliance with federal flammability standards, which poses a significant fire risk. These gray rectangular rugs measure 8 feet by 10 feet and are labeled as '100% Polyester' with 'Made in China' indicated on the underside. Consumers should take this matter seriously to ensure their safety.
recalls.Title: Touchat Large Fuzzy Area Rugs Recalled for Fire Hazard Due to Flammability Regulation Violations
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, please reach out to Touchat at 909-390-0801 from 10 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or via email at jurysun@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Touchat Large Fuzzy Area Rug

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively on Amazon.com from October 2023 to November 2023, priced between $80 and $113.

Distributors.Name: Jian De Shi Jia Jin Chu Kou You Xian Gong Si DBA Touchat, of China

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to violation of federal flammability regulations

Remedies.Name: Stop using the rugs immediately and contact Touchat for a full refund. Consumers must destroy the product by cutting it in half and send a photo of the destroyed item to jurysun@outlook.com to receive their refund. Touchat will reach out to all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: Touchat recalls Large Fuzzy Area Rugs due to fire hazards. Contact Touchat for refunds and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: The recall pertains to two styles of large area rugs offered in three sizes. These rugs feature neutral and multicolor patterns without any labels. Sizes available include Light Gray/Ivory and Gray Beige/Light Yellow in dimensions of 5'3" x 6'6", 6'6" x 8'2", and 6'6" x 9'10". The rugs have been found to violate federal flammability regulations, creating a potential fire hazard for consumers.
recalls.Title: Recall of JURLEA Area Rugs Due to Fire Risk; Noncompliance with Federal Flammability Standards; Available Only on Amazon.com
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to Yalande-US via email at yalande_us2021@163.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled JURLEA Rugs in Light Gray/Ivory
Recalled JURLEA Rugs in Gray Beige/Light Yellow

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Amazon.com from April 2023 to December 2023, priced between $60 and $130.

Importers.Name: Kaka Trading Co. LTD, of China

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to violation of federal flammability regulations.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must cease using the rugs immediately and contact Yalande-US for a full refund. They will need to destroy the rug by cutting it in half and provide photographic proof of the destruction to yalande_us2021@163.com to receive their refund. Yalande-US will directly notify all known customers.

recalls.metaDescription: JURLEA Area Rugs recalled for fire hazard; contact Yalande-US for refunds and destruction instructions.
